title: epidendrum lankesteri
intro: Epidendrum lankesteri, also known as the Lankester's Orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Costa Rica. The medicinal properties of Epidendrum lankesteri include its potential to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Epidendrum lankesteri are often used in traditional medicine, and it is typically dried and made into a tea or capsule for consumption.
